svg.title: Bedroom one memory fragment (apartment four) - preserved, sharp, lonely
svg.desc: Looking straight at the bedside corner of a carefully made bedroom: a low pale walnut nightstand with a clean cylindrical lamp, a framed photograph placed dead-center, a small modern alarm clock with frozen hands, and a single book squared to the table edge. To the right, the corner of a bed with a smooth taupe duvet, two stacked cream pillows, and a folded dusty-teal throw at the foot. To the left, a cropped window with sheer curtains that have not moved once and a flat, unmoving sky behind them. The room is softly overlit, the lamp pool is too perfectly elliptical, the photograph's glass holds a reflection of the room that is suspiciously sharp. Very strong negative wall space. Nothing animates. The room reads as a memory still being maintained.
